name: Web App Delivery
description: Full delivery workflow for a new web application: scaffold → auth → services → integrations → responsive → smoke test → ship.

start.name: Start
start.description: Begin web app delivery. Confirm appName, stackId, designSystem, and features list with user. Resolve projectDir.

scaffold_verify.name: Verify Scaffold
scaffold_verify.description: Read plugins/web-studio/steps/scaffold/verify-scaffold.md. Build must pass and app must load in Chrome.

auth_verify.name: Verify Auth
auth_verify.description: Read plugins/web-studio/steps/auth/verify-auth.md. Auth pages must render and protected redirect must work.

build_features.name: Build Domain Services
build_features.description: For each feature the user specified: read plugins/web-studio/steps/feature/build-service.md and build the service. Use SetItems for multiple features.

features_verify.name: Verify Features
features_verify.description: Run the stack's build command — all services must compile. Check routes are registered.

build_integrations.name: Build Integrations
build_integrations.description: For each integration (payments, email, realtime): read the corresponding step in plugins/web-studio/steps/integration/ and build it. Use SetItems.

integrations_verify.name: Verify Integrations
integrations_verify.description: Run build command. Verify integration endpoints respond correctly.

smoke_test.name: Smoke Test
smoke_test.description: Read plugins/web-studio/steps/delivery/smoke-test.md. Visual verification of all routes.

review.name: Code Review
review.description: Read plugins/web-studio/steps/delivery/review.md. Full code review for security and correctness.

end_success.name: App Delivered
end_success.description: App is scaffolded, auth works, features are built, integrations wired, visually verified, code reviewed, and committed.

hitl_blocked.name: Blocked
hitl_blocked.description: A step failed and could not be automatically resolved. Review the error and decide how to proceed.
